---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEATURE REQUEST] ___"
labels: enhancement
assignees: harmfulladvocado
type: Feature

---

## What's the problem?

What's frustrating you? Be specific about when or why you run into this.

## What do you want instead?

Describe the solution. How would it work?

## Other options you thought of

What else could solve this? Why didn't you pick those?

## Anything else?

Screenshots, examples from other sites, rough sketches, whatever helps us understand.
